findings.text: The tenant is MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA, occupying Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House, Edinburgh, from 13 March 2026 to 25 August 2026, with total rent of £4,686.18.
A £500 advance rent payment has been acknowledged and credited to the tenant's account.
The contract states a separate rent schedule will be provided; this schedule is not in the current evidence bundle.
The contract references a guarantor named on the tenant's accommodation application; that application is not in the evidence bundle.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter file inventory and source directories for (1) the rent schedule referenced in Clause 2(a) of NAP-SRC-0010, and (2) the tenant's accommodation application containing the guarantor's name and contact details. If found, extract and add them to the evidence bundle. If not found, flag as a missing document requiring human follow-up.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate rent schedule and guarantor application for NAP-SRC-0010

risk_flags.text: Missing rent schedule and guarantor details create a gap in evidence needed to assess arrears and enforcement options.

summary: Extracted text from NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence) identifies the tenant as MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA, the premises as Castlelaw House, and a total rent of £4,686.18. The contract references a separate rent schedule and a guarantor named on the tenant's application, but neither document is included in the evidence bundle. The extracted text is truncated and may be incomplete. A follow-up task is proposed to locate the rent schedule and guarantor details.

uncertainties.text: The rent schedule referenced in Clause 2(a) is missing; monthly instalment amounts and due dates cannot be verified.
The guarantor's identity and contact details are not present in the provided source; they are on a separate application form.
The extracted text is truncated; additional terms (e.g., late fees, notice provisions) may be missing from the end of the document.
